role: A host-to-render data-shaping adapter layer that converts raw API records into the record shapes consumed by renderArchetype.
capabilities: Adapt raw /api/sessions records into session-card render records
Adapt raw /api/channels records into channel-graph/hub-network render records
Adapt /api/board rows into grouped board render records
Adapt /api/transcript-search responses into constellation render records in raw and grounded modes
Normalize group dictionaries into declared arrays for the render slot shape
Normalize channel member lists whether provided as arrays or objects
Derive human-readable labels, relative timestamps, short paths, fact lists, and provenance metadata
Compute normalized scores, weights, warmth, brightness, and degraded-mode flags
substance_why: The file implements four complete, domain-specific adapter functions with field mapping, grouping, two-mode transcript shaping, and helper normalization, all documented with binding contracts.
interactions_missing: No user-driven controls are wired (e.g., groupBy selection, transcript mode toggle, sorting)
No validation, empty-state, or error-state handling for malformed or missing API payloads
No loading/async lifecycle integration beyond pure synchronous transformation
No selection, hover, or action handlers for the derived records
performance_risks: Full record derivation is recomputed on every call with no memoization or caching
channelGraph uses a spread into Math.max, materializing an intermediate array of all channel weights
grounded transcript mode maps nested claims without size limits, risking large derived structures
Per-item string regex and split operations in rel and shortCwd run on every record
reuse_why: The adapter logic is host-agnostic and worth preserving, but the global IIFE registration, untyped fields, and mixed-domain file should be modernized into typed, modular exports.
decomposition_hints: Split per domain into session-adapter, channel-graph-adapter, board-adapter, and transcript-adapter modules
Extract shared helpers rel and shortCwd into a date/path normalization utility module
Separate transcript raw-mode and grounded-mode builders into distinct internal functions or files
Move provenance/degradation metadata construction into a shared provenance helper if reused across adapters
